title: Hematuria Workup
objectives: Understand the pathophysiology of Hematuria Workup
Identify key diagnostic criteria for Hematuria Workup
Recognize complications and when to escalate care

sections.title: Overview & Pathophysiology
sections.content: **Hematuria Workup** — This section covers the fundamental pathophysiology, epidemiology, and clinical significance. Understanding the underlying mechanisms is essential for clinical reasoning and evidence-based management.

sections.title: Clinical Presentation & Diagnosis
sections.content: Key clinical features, diagnostic criteria, and workup for Hematuria Workup. This section emphasizes pattern recognition and systematic diagnostic approaches.

sections.title: Management & Treatment
sections.content: Evidence-based management strategies for Hematuria Workup, including first-line therapies, escalation pathways, and monitoring parameters.

sections.title: Complications & Follow-Up
sections.content: Potential complications, prognosis, and longitudinal management considerations for Hematuria Workup.

keyTakeaways: Recognize the classic presentation of Hematuria Workup
Identify red flags requiring urgent intervention

reviewQuestions.question: Which of the following is the MOST important initial step in evaluating a patient with suspected Hematuria Workup?
options: Obtain a thorough history and physical examination
Consult a specialist before any evaluation
reviewQuestions.explanation: A thorough history and physical examination is always the cornerstone of clinical evaluation for Hematuria Workup, guiding subsequent diagnostic workup and management decisions.

reviewQuestions.question: What is the MOST critical factor in determining the management approach for Hematuria Workup?
reviewQuestions.explanation: Clinical severity and appropriate risk stratification guide management decisions in Hematuria Workup, determining the level of intervention and monitoring required.

reviewQuestions.question: Which complication of Hematuria Workup requires the MOST urgent intervention?
reviewQuestions.explanation: Hemodynamic instability in the setting of Hematuria Workup requires immediate intervention including fluid resuscitation, close monitoring, and potentially escalation to critical care.

imaging_reasoning.order_reasoning: CT urogram is definitive; US for initial evaluation especially in young patients
imaging_reasoning.expected_findings: Stone, mass, cyst, hydronephrosis, urothelial thickening
imaging_reasoning.management_impact: Mass → urology referral; stone → size-based management; glomerular hematuria → nephrology
